library_preparation_preflight.summary: The artifact is a small annotation-only Maven Plugin Tools API jar; its only declared dependency is org.apache.maven:maven-artifact:3.0, which normal Gradle resolution should bring transitively. Normal use is annotating Maven Mojo classes, but meaningful tests can exercise the annotation types, defaults, enum values, and compiled annotation metadata without extra services, Docker images, environment variables, or system properties.
library_preparation_preflight.agent_guidance: No environment variables or system properties are needed. Be aware that the annotations use RetentionPolicy.CLASS, so runtime reflection on annotated test classes will not find @Mojo/@Parameter/@Component/@Execute; tests should inspect annotation type metadata/default values or classfile-visible annotation attributes if they need to assert annotation usage.
risks: A generated test that expects runtime-retained annotations on annotated classes would be misleading because these annotations are class-retained, not runtime-retained.

Full Maven plugin descriptor generation would require other Maven Plugin Tools artifacts, but that is beyond the target artifact and is not required for meaningful coverage of maven-plugin-annotations itself.
